readings.summary: Jeremiah is given his mission and promised protection.

readings.citation: I will sing of your salvation.
readings.antiphon: I will sing of your salvation.

readings.summary:
The Lord sent me to bring glad tidings to the poor,
to proclaim liberty to captives.
No prophet gains acceptance in his own land.

antiphons.text:
Save us, O Lord our God!
And gather us from the nations,
to give thanks to your holy name,
and make it our glory to praise you.

Let your face shine on your servant.
Save me in your merciful love.
O Lord, let me never be put to shame, for I call on you.

Blessed are the poor in spirit,
for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven.
Blessed are the meek, for they shall possess the land.
